stable_1_3_14: first unescaped close leaves scanner bracket state
rationale: brace discovery and class matching intentionally use separate closing rules

stable_1_3_14: comma may incorrectly create brace branches
rationale: prevents valid or malformed class text from manufacturing alternatives

stable_1_3_14: class matching can consume sibling branch delimiters
rationale: compiled alternatives have explicit ownership boundaries and malformed siblings cannot capture each other

stable_1_3_14: sequential nested branch state can suppress suffix punctuation
rationale: compiled alternatives leave no dynamic brace depth that can leak into following pattern text
